Attribution reality · Email
Your email platform counts an open as a conversion for 5 days. Magellan counts the order. The solid bar is what your orders verify — the hatched extent is what the platform claimed.
0%
air
$62K verifiedplatform claims $79K22% air · +$17K
++$17K claimed
$62K VERIFIED BY ORDERS
Window conflict: $11K of that air was also claimed by other channels — $7K by ads, $4K by search. Your plugin sees the real last click, so it isn't double-counted.

Growth AI · Email Flows
High confidenceEmail platform + ordersLast sync: today 07:30
Paused flow
Back in Stock paused — losing $11K/mo
This flow had the highest conversion rate of any you run (18.5%). It's switched off. Reactivating is a five-minute action.
Missing flow
Browse Abandonment worth $42–63K/mo
9,960 product viewers last month with zero follow-up. Industry average is 2–3% conversion on browse flows — the biggest hole in your program.
List health
18% of list unengaged — no sunset flow
Sending to dead profiles drags inbox placement across all your emails. A sunset flow protects deliverability for the whole program.

Earning nowReactivate (Back in Stock)Build (Browse, VIP)
Flows earn $62K/mo today. Reactivating Back in Stock adds +$11K, building Browse Abandonment adds +$42–63K, and a VIP/Loyalty flow adds +$18–24K — an 115–158% increase in flow revenue, with no additional ad spend.
